question_text: Severe lower abdominal or pelvic pain?
Dizziness, fainting, or feeling like you might pass out?
Bleeding very heavy (soaking ≥1 pad/hour or large clots)?
Shoulder pain or severe one-sided pelvic pain?
Bleeding after delivery within last 6 weeks (postpartum)?
Known fibroids or history of abnormal uterine bleeding?
Bleeding between periods (not a normal period)?
Severe headache or vision changes with bleeding?
Known bleeding disorder or easy bruising?
Redness or warmth on the breast skin?
Pus or nipple discharge that is bloody?
Currently breastfeeding or within 6 weeks postpartum?
Skin dimpling, nipple retraction, or peau d'orange changes?
Breast pain linked to menstrual cycle?
History of breast cancer or high-risk family history?
Enlarged tender lymph nodes in armpit?
